script: echo '===== Update Emily bot endpoint =====' && az resource update --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-EmilyClaude --set properties.endpoint=https://openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com/emily-claude/api/messages 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('endpoint after update:', d.get('properties',{}).get('endpoint'))" 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Verify =====' && az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-EmilyClaude --query 'properties.endpoint' -o tsv 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Same fix for Neil-Claude =====' && az resource update --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-NeilClaude --set properties.endpoint=https://openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com/neil-claude/api/messages 2>&1 | tail -3; echo 'verify Neil:'; az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-NeilClaude --query 'properties.endpoint' -o tsv 2>&1
